name: Beach St. / Burns School
description:
The courts are not formally ADA Wheelchair Accessible, but if the person/player can traverse approximately 50ft of mowed grass, then they will be able to play on these courts.  There is also a handicap-accessible port-a-potty.

We provide balls for use during Open-Play hours.
open_play_schedule: See our website for any scheduling changes.

name: Beachwood Ave.
description: Beachwood Ave. is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kennebunkport, ME. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Berwick Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Berwick Academy in South Berwick, ME! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Berwick Recreational Field
description: The official hours, according to signage at the location, are sunrise to sunset at least for the summer months.

name: Bounce Pickle & Play
description: Bounce Pickle & Play is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Biddeford, ME. There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Carpentier Park
description: Carpentier Park is a place to play pickleball in Sanford, ME. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Clifford Park
description: These courts are first come first serve with no enforcement of open-play rotation

name: Consolidated School Gym
description: Consolidated School Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kennebunkport, ME. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees:
Fee required — Single Day: $5 at the door
Punch Pass: $50 for 10 visits (no expiration)

name: Hollis Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Hollis Sports Complex in Hollis Center, ME! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at J Richard Martin Community Center in Biddeford, ME! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Seacoast Pickleball
description: Southern Maine's only indoor pickleball facility.  8 state of the art courts with full dividing nets for uninterrupted play. Other entertainment is available, ping pong, cornhole and jazzminton. Something for everyone!
fees: Members only — Memberships are required, but for those visiting the area we do offer punch cards for drop in play of non-members.
